_comment: Single source of truth for install-fleet.sh. Edit here, not in the installer.

components.label: Workflow Gates
components.description: Fail-closed gate plugins (Nio, Nurikabe) and the workflow state engine they exec. Cannot be split.
components.coupling: nio.js and nurikabe.js exec scripts/workflow-state.mjs at runtime

components.label: Model Failover
components.description: Migawari plugin and the routing manifest it reads. Cannot be split.

components.label: Security Gate
components.description: Komainu plugin: screens Edit/Write calls for 35+ dangerous code patterns. Standalone.

components.label: Specialist Agents (24 core)
components.description: 24 specialist and subagent shikigami. Soft dependency on failover routing-manifest.json and docs/models/** for model selection.
components.coupling: soft dep on failover routing-manifest.json; auto-included at same scope if failover not selected there

components.label: Agent Support Scripts
components.description: Verification and safety scripts called by agents via karakuri (code runner). No hard coupling.

components.label: Rules
components.description: Memory contract and other rules loaded via instructions glob in opencode.json.
components.coupling: wired via instructions glob in opencode.json

components.label: Reference Docs
components.description: OPERATOR guide, architecture overview, manifest schema, agent template, model family guides. Reference only, not required at runtime.

components.label: Brand Builder / Kitsune (opt-in)
components.description: Kitsune's full domain: 9 brand agents, brand plugin, commands, and skills. Requires bun install. Opens a per-project SQLite DB on init.
components.coupling: brand-builder-plugin depends on its own node_modules; brand agents depend on brand commands and skills
